role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of linguistic evidence (no signs visible) and remained silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on vegetation, terrain, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Cocos nucifera) and canopy types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed utility poles, transformers, and road infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, architectural style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents provided a high-quality, visually grounded analysis. The failure to identify the Philippines (Ground Truth) was due to the visual ambiguity of the scene (tropical infrastructure common to both regions) and the agents' reliance on 'US-standard' utility hardware to rule out Southeast Asia, which is a plausible heuristic error in this specific context.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described tropical vegetation and housing.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified palms and broadleaf canopy.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described concrete poles and wiring.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described camera artifacts and architectural style.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The specialists collectively assigned 'support' to the Philippines but 'strongly_support' to Puerto Rico based on utility pole hardware. This high confidence in the wrong candidate (PR) and lower confidence in the truth (PH) set up the tournament to fail, as the judge followed the specialists' lead.
